title: Workers Mourning Day Act
description: Workers Mourning Day Act (Workers Mourning Day Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Workers Mourning Day Act .

provisions.title: Day of Mourning
provisions.content: 2 (1) Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the 28th day of April shall be known under the name of "Day of Mourning for Persons Killed or Injured in the Workplace". (2) For greater certainty, the Day of Mourning for Persons Killed or Injured in the Workplace is not a legal holiday or a non-juridical day and shall not be required to be kept or observed as such.
